title: Each unit will be exported with:
content:
Each unit will be exported with:

- TITLE
- CONTEXT HEADER
- REF_ID
- FORMAT TYPE
- ARCHIVE LOCATION
- BODY CONTENT
- NEXT ACTIONS

Example filenames:

- `::4_bl00m_PROFILE.md`
- `::M4_EDU_SYLLABUS_V1.md`
- `::GR1ND3R_PROJECT_PROFILE.md`
- `::KONS0L_ARCHIVE_REFS_01.md`

---

### NEXT ACTION ITEMS:

1. Confirm FILTER TAG SYSTEM
2. Set hierarchy levels for ::ET4L / ::ETCETER4 / ::4_bl00m
3. Choose GLYPH FORMAT: Unicode, Custom, ASCII
4. Confirm EXPORTED FORMAT: For iOS Notes / GitHub
5. Greenlight build of:
- MANIFESTO V1
- GITHUB README
- EDUCATION SYSTEM DOCS
